历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the lowest rank for science was approximately 36,337; in 2024, it was about 66,147; in 2025, for physics category, it was about 77,689. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social heat of related major categories is stable. The total number of Sichuan Province Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to the total in 2025 (physics category 284,789 + history category 177,978 = 462,767). Estimated physics category examinees about 329,000 based on the 2025 category ratio, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 284,789 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, a remote area university, with certain regional preference disadvantages for Sichuan examinees, but its 211 status still attracts. The school has a high proportion of enrollment in its own province (Tibet), and its enrollment scale in Sichuan Province has been continuously expanding in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the basically flat 2026 plan, the significant increase in total Sichuan examinees (about +15.5%) leading to intensified competition, and the slight decline in Soft Science ranking, based on the 2025 baseline of 77,689, the rank is expected to continue shifting backward.
